summary: Software engineer with 4+ years building and optimizing high-throughput, production-critical data pipelines processing tens of millions of daily transactions. Deep Python proficiency, hands-on API design and orchestration experience, and strong foundations in concurrency, retry logic, and error handling. Cornell CS graduate with growing experience in LLM APIs and generative AI tooling.
skills_html:
Languages: Python, SQL, Java (fundamentals)  |  Frameworks/Infra: FastAPI (familiar), Flask, Docker, Postgres, SQLite, Redis (exposure), Git, GitHub Actions (exposure)
Data/Systems: High-throughput pipelines, concurrency, AMPS message queues, Pandas, API design & orchestration, retries & error handling
AI / ML: LLM APIs, agentic coding & orchestration, ML data processing & annotation  |  Practices: Performance optimization, pipeline design, code review, documentation

experience.sub: Cirrus OTC Trade Reporting  |  Python, Pandas, Quartz, AMPS
bullets: Designed and built production orchestration across multiple services processing tens of millions of transactions daily, with retries, error handling, and load balancing.
Built an extensible reference-data framework: pipeline of services connected via message queues, querying multiple external APIs per event and handling failures gracefully.
Implemented a T+1 Unique Trade Identifier service validating trade-ID uniqueness across counterparties and issuing corrections at millions of transactions per day.
Developed a parallelized high-volume backreporting service, automating a previously manual process with substantial speed and throughput gains.
Designed clean API interfaces between services: internal model transformer (to outgoing XML) and a response parser to update transaction statuses.
Optimized reliability, latency, and throughput of core services by orders of magnitude; authored Python/Pandas tooling to analyze 50–100GB datasets.
Processed and annotated data used to train ML models; built Python pipelines to clean, transform, and report on user-collected datasets for the data science team.
Designed and released 50+ engineering drawings including flight and test components; performed structural analyses for large assemblies and fastener stacks.

projects: Reading Recommendations App (Flask, Gemini API, SQLite) — Built an LLM-powered daily recommender integrating generative AI APIs over a Project Gutenberg corpus, handling API orchestration and error handling.
Market Data Dashboard (Postgres, Docker, Twilio) — Ingests market data from multiple external APIs (Binance, Hyperliquid); automated alerting pipeline with SMS notifications on signal triggers.
Polymarket Scanner (Flask, Discord API, SQLite) — Scans Polymarket for large trades and unusual activity; lightweight API backend with real-time alert delivery.

education.role: Cornell University, College of Engineering — Ithaca, NY
education.sub: B.S. Computer Science  &  B.S. Mechanical Engineering  |  GPA 3.7
bullets: CUAIR (Cornell Unmanned Aircraft) — Developed systems for an autonomous plane including obstacle avoidance, object classification, and airdrop; top-performing team at the AUVSI SUAS competition.
